summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control - All 13 requested features verified working. Fresh state with localStorage clear triggers version migration and loads default spaces. Space indicators (banner, chip, sidebar border) all functional. Cowork conversation + button opens connectors menu with Services + Desktop Apps. All 10 pages render correctly.
passed_tests: Fresh State: After clearing localStorage, default spaces (Files, Design, Development) load correctly via persist version 2 migration
Custom Space: Creating a new space via PlusMenu gets auto-assigned unique color and works with all indicators
Chat Space Banner: Shows colored banner with space icon + name above messages (data-testid='chat-space-banner') - verified 'Design space' banner
Sidebar Threads: Space-linked threads have colored left border + space name badge ('Design' badge visible)
InputBar Space Chip: Shows colored chip (data-testid='space-indicator-chip') - verified 'Design' chip
Cowork Conversation: + button opens connectors menu with Services + Desktop Apps (data-testid='cowork-conv-plus-btn')
Cowork Conversation: Desktop app groups expandable with toggles (conv-desktop-adobe, conv-desktop-microsoft, conv-desktop-google, conv-desktop-other)
Cowork Conversation: Right sidebar shows CONNECTORS section with active count ('0 active')
Cowork Task List: Connectors & Desktop Apps panel works (data-testid='cowork-connectors-toggle') - Services (12 connectors) + Desktop Apps (4 groups)
Chat PlusMenu: Shows Add to Spaces, Connectors, Skills, Plugins, Research, Web search, Use style - service connectors only in Connectors submenu
PlusMenu Spaces: Shows all default + custom spaces with correct icons (Files, Design, Development + New space input)
Model Selector: Shows 6 providers (huggingface, ollama, opencode, opencode-go, openrouter, venice) - working correctly
All 10 Pages: Navigate and verify rendering (Chat, Dashboard, Jobs, Approvals, Spaces, Settings, Cowork, Customize, Agent, Code)
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store with persist version 2 migration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: 1) localStorage persist version 2 with migration function ensures fresh state gets DEFAULT_SPACES (Files, Design, Development). 2) Cowork conversation + button (cowork-conv-plus-btn) opens dropdown with Services (first 6) + Desktop Apps groups (Adobe, Microsoft, Google, Other). 3) Right sidebar in Cowork conversation shows CONNECTORS section with active count. 4) Chat space banner (chat-space-banner) shows colored banner with space icon + name + 'space' label. 5) Sidebar threads show colored left border + space name badge. 6) InputBar shows colored space chip (space-indicator-chip). 7) Custom space creation via PlusMenu works with auto-assigned colors. 8) Model selector shows 6 providers. Key data-testids: cowork-conv-plus-btn, conv-desktop-adobe, conv-desktop-microsoft, conv-desktop-google, conv-desktop-other, cowork-connectors-toggle, chat-space-banner, space-indicator-chip, plus-menu-trigger, space-assign-space-files, space-assign-space-design, space-assign-space-dev, new-space-input, create-space-btn, model-selector-trigger.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage, switchModel, toggleConnector, assignThreadToSpace, addSpace, all state updates
